title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe: a background thread in AgentTaskRunner that monitors context token utilization; when >85%, summarizes each conversation-turn memory via LLM, computes local 256-dim character 3-gram vectors, filters memories by cosine similarity (>0.3) to current goal, and writes kept IDs to `session.selectedMemoryIds`. Uses cooling (30s) and min-memory (3) guards. Vectorization is local (no external embedding API). Pepe is optional, uses existing ProviderAdapter. Lifecycle: start/stop around agent loop.
